_comment_top: R6 task 106 (D-H-06, FR-14) — seed row for the ClauseAnalyzerHandler typed handler.
_comment_routing: Runtime invocation routes to the C# class via sprk_handlerclass = 'ClauseAnalyzerHandler' (= nameof handler class).
_comment_consumption: Read by scripts/Seed-TypedHandlers.ps1. Idempotent — script queries by sprk_toolcode first; UPSERTs.
_comment_toolcode: R6 audit item 4 (2026-06-07): sprk_toolcode column extended manually from 10 to 100 chars. Renamed from 'CLZ-AN@v1' to descriptive 'CLAUSE-ANALYZER'. NO @v1 suffix per cross-environment migration policy.
sprk_description: LLM-assisted contract clause structuring. Identifies typed clauses (indemnity, liability, termination, payment, ip-assignment, confidentiality, governing-law, warranty, force-majeure, assignment) and returns per-clause structured fields plus non-overlapping span boundaries. Configurable clauseTypes filter and optional obligation / party extraction. Distinct from ClauseComparisonHandler (which DIFFS two clauses deterministically).
_comment_availableincontexts: 100000002 = Both (Playbook + Chat). FR-14: clause structuring is useful from both playbook nodes (post-extraction) and the chat surface (ad-hoc structuring of user-supplied clause text).

text.description: Input contract text to structure into typed clauses.

clauseTypes.description: Subset of clause types to extract. Defaults to all supported types.

_comment_configuration: Default policy: extract all supported clause types; emit obligations + parties. Per-invocation requests may override clauseTypes and options.
